description: This handy A6 notebook is perfect for keeping notes organized. Featuring a sturdy padded hard cover and a ribbon page marker, it allows you to easily find your place. With 124 pages and an included padlock and key, you can rest assured your private notes are securely kept. The undated format means you can start using it any time and for any purpose. Small enough to slip in a bag yet with plenty of pages, this notebook is a versatile choice for students, professionals or anyone who needs a place to jot down thoughts and ideas. Read more
